Authors: Chimmula, Vinay Kumar Reddy; Zhang, Lei
Title: Time series forecasting of COVID-19 transmission in Canada using LSTM networks
Motivation: Representative example of LSTM adoption in time-series forecasting and evidence of the rapid growth of deep learning approaches in forecasting applications.

Authors: Benvenuto, Domenico; Giovanetti, Marta; Vassallo, Loredana; Angeletti, Silvia; Ciccozzi, Massimo
Title: Application of the ARIMA model on the COVID-2019 epidemic dataset
Motivation: Represents traditional statistical forecasting methods and establishes the ARIMA baseline family analyzed in the study.

Authors: Lim, Bryan; Zohren, Stefan
Title: Time-series forecasting with deep learning: a survey
Motivation: Provides a broad overview of deep learning approaches for forecasting and supports the discussion on the evolution of forecasting techniques.
Journal_Conference: Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society A

Authors: Smyl, Slawek
Title: A hybrid method of exponential smoothing and recurrent neural networks for time series forecasting
Motivation: Demonstrates the effectiveness of hybrid forecasting architectures and justifies the inclusion of the Hybrid family.

Authors: Makridakis, Spyros; Spiliotis, Evangelos; Assimakopoulos, Vassilios
Title: Statistical and Machine Learning forecasting methods: Concerns and ways forward
Motivation: Provides a critical comparison between statistical and machine learning forecasting approaches.

Authors: Sculley, David; Holt, Gary; Golovin, Daniel; Davydov, Eugene; Phillips, Todd; Ebner, Dietmar; Chaudhary, Vinay; Young, Michael; Crespo, Jean-Francois; Dennison, Dan
Title: Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems
Motivation: Introduces technical debt challenges specific to machine learning systems and motivates sustainability analysis.
Journal_Conference: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)

Authors: Lwakatare, Lucy Ellen; Raj, Aiswarya; Bosch, Jan; Holmstrom Olsson, Helena; Crnkovic, Ivica
Title: A Taxonomy of Software Engineering Challenges for Machine Learning Systems: An Empirical Investigation
Motivation: Identifies software engineering challenges unique to ML systems, supporting the SE4ML perspective.
Journal_Conference: International Conference on Agile Software Development

Authors: Amershi, Saleema; Begel, Andrew; Bird, Christian; DeLine, Robert; Kamar, Ece; Nagappan, Nachiappan; Nushi, Besmira; Zimmermann, Thomas
Title: Software Engineering for Machine Learning: A Case Study
Motivation: Landmark SE4ML work demonstrating how ML projects differ from traditional software projects.

Authors: Paleyes, Andrei; Urma, Raoul-Gabriel; Lawrence, Neil D.
Title: Challenges in deploying machine learning: a survey of case studies
Motivation: Highlights deployment and maintenance challenges in ML systems, reinforcing sustainability concerns.

Authors: Washizaki, Hironori; Uchida, Hiromu; Khomh, Foutse; Gueheneuc, Yann-Gael
Title: Studying software engineering patterns for designing machine learning systems
Motivation: Provides engineering patterns that influence maintainability and quality in ML systems.

Authors: Kalliamvakou, Eirini; Gousios, Georgios; Blincoe, Kelly; Singer, Leif; German, Daniel M.; Damian, Daniela
Title: An in-depth study of the promises and perils of mining GitHub
Motivation: Foundational study discussing methodological strengths and limitations of GitHub mining.

Authors: Coelho, Jailton; Valente, Marco Tulio
Title: Why modern open source projects fail
Motivation: Directly investigates factors associated with OSS project failure and abandonment.

Authors: Coelho, Jailton; Valente, Marco Tulio; Silva, Luciana L.
Title: Is this GitHub project maintained? Measuring the level of maintenance activity of open-source projects
Motivation: Provides definitions and indicators of project maintenance and inactivity used in abandonment studies.

Authors: Islam, Md Johirul; Nguyen, Giang; Pan, Rangeet; Rajan, Hridesh
Title: A comprehensive study on deep learning bug characteristics
Motivation: Investigates bug patterns in deep learning systems and their maintenance implications.

Authors: Han, Junxiao; Shihab, Emad; Wan, Zhiyuan; Deng, Shuo; Xia, Xin
Title: What do programmers discuss about deep learning frameworks
Motivation: Explores developer concerns and challenges associated with deep learning frameworks.

Authors: Valiev, Marat; Vasilescu, Bogdan; Herbsleb, James
Title: Ecosystem-level determinants of sustained activity in open-source projects: a case study of the PyPI ecosystem
Motivation: One of the most relevant prior studies on software survival and sustained ecosystem activity.

Authors: Decan, Alexandre; Mens, Tom; Grosjean, Philippe
Title: An empirical comparison of dependency network evolution in seven software packaging ecosystems
Motivation: Analyzes dependency evolution and ecosystem sustainability over time.

Authors: Borges, Hudson; Hora, Andre; Valente, Marco Tulio
Title: Understanding the factors that impact the popularity of GitHub repositories
Motivation: Provides empirical evidence regarding popularity indicators such as stars and forks.

Authors: Jansen, Slinger
Title: Measuring the health of open source software ecosystems and the interference with return on investment
Motivation: Introduces concepts related to software ecosystem health and sustainability.

Authors: Manikas, Konstantinos; Hansen, Klaus Marius
Title: Software ecosystems—A systematic literature review
Motivation: Foundational review establishing the software ecosystem perspective adopted in the study.
